review: Absolutely gorgeous candle — the lavender scent is beautiful and not at all overpowering. Came packaged really carefully and arrived quickly. Will definitely be ordering again as a gift.
Lovely mug, really solid and the speckled glaze is even nicer in person than in the photos. My morning coffee tastes better out of it! Fast postage too, thank you.
The macramé wall hanging is stunning — looks exactly like the listing photo and the craftsmanship is excellent. It arrived beautifully wrapped. Highly recommend this shop.
Really nice linen tea towel, the print is clear and the fabric feels great. Only minor thing is the colour was slightly different to the photo on my screen, but overall very happy and great quality.
Bought this as a stocking filler and it's absolutely perfect. The leather is really good quality and the personalisation looks brilliant. Great little Irish-made gift.
The maple cutting board is gorgeous — nice weight to it and the wood grain is beautiful. Got it as a housewarming present and it was a big hit. Packaged safely and arrived in great condition.
Second order from this shop and just as lovely as the first. The lavender candle burns really evenly and smells wonderful. Great handmade product, very happy to support an Irish maker.
Ordered two mugs for a gift set — both arrived perfectly wrapped and look beautiful. The speckled glaze is unique and really attractive. Will be back for more!
This macramé piece is a real statement — hung it in the hallway and everyone asks about it. Really well made and packaged with care. Lovely to buy something genuinely handmade.
Good quality tea towel, the print is vibrant and the linen washes well. Delivery was fast and packaging was thoughtful. Would buy again — just wish there were more design options.
Brilliant little bookmark — the leather is soft and the personalisation is neat and clean. Arrived quickly and was a great secret Santa gift. Really pleased with it.
Lovely pressed flower frame — such a thoughtful and delicate piece. It arrived incredibly well protected and looks perfect on the windowsill. A beautiful Irish-made keepsake.
The knitted beanie is so well made — really warm and the stitch is tight and even. Fits perfectly and looks great. Excellent value for a handmade item and arrived before Christmas too.
Got the hand-bound notebook as a gift for my sister who journals — she absolutely loves it. The binding is beautiful and the paper quality is great. Highly recommend GalwayWorkshop.
The cast iron tea light holder is gorgeous — solid, heavy and really atmospheric in the evenings. Looks like something you'd find in a craft shop in Galway. Will be ordering more as gifts.
